rationale_short: REACH regulation restricting hazardous chemicals in substances, mixtures, and articles including vehicle components.
Pedestrian protection requirements covering front structure energy absorption and impact zones.
General safety regulation framework for motor vehicle type-approval replacing multiple directives.
Maximum permissible sound level limits for motor vehicles.
WLTP test procedure for CO2 and exhaust emissions type-approval of light passenger and commercial vehicles.
Framework regulation for type-approval and market surveillance of motor vehicles and their trailers.
Tyre labeling requirements for fuel efficiency, wet grip, and external rolling noise performance.
General Safety Regulation mandating advanced safety systems including AEBS, ISA, and driver monitoring.
Detailed technical requirements implementing the General Safety Regulation 2019/2144.
Type-approval requirements for automated driving systems and lane-keeping functions.
Batteries regulation covering EV battery performance, labeling, and sustainability requirements.
Definitions of vehicle categories and technical terms used throughout the Safety Regulations for Road Vehicles.
Steering device strength, operability, and driver impact protection requirements.
Fuel quality standards specifying permissible fuel properties for road vehicles.
Spring and shock absorber requirements for ground impact absorption.
